executiveSummary.summary: Strong founder-market fit and growing category, but significant structural challenges. The 15% commission on already thin-margin sustainable brands creates a fundamental tension. Customer acquisition costs in fashion e-commerce typically run $50-150, making unit economics difficult without high AOV or repeat rates. Your fashion industry experience is valuable, but you're entering a crowded space where differentiation beyond 'curation' will be critical.

marketSize.som: $1-3M realistic year 1-2 obtainable market (0.1-0.3% of SAM)
marketSize.methodology: Based on 200-500 brands at $5K average annual GMV per brand

competitors.name: The RealReal
competitors.description: Luxury consignment marketplace with sustainability angle
competitors.weakness: Focus on secondhand, not new sustainable brands

competitors.name: Garmentory
competitors.description: Curated marketplace for independent fashion brands
competitors.strength: Similar curation model, established brand relationships

competitors.name: Etsy
competitors.description: Handmade and vintage marketplace with growing sustainability section
competitors.strength: Massive scale, established customer base, low barriers

marketAnalysis.positioning: The vetted sustainable fashion marketplace for conscious consumers who want discovery without compromise
marketAnalysis.timing: Good - Gen Z/Millennial sustainability consciousness at peak, but marketplace fatigue also growing
gaps: Brand success metrics beyond just sales

valueProposition.coreProblem: Conscious consumers struggle to discover legitimate sustainable fashion brands among greenwashing and low-quality options
valueProposition.targetCustomer: Urban millennials/Gen Z, household income $75K+, already shopping sustainable brands, willing to pay premium for convenience and curation
valueProposition.uniqueAngle: Rigorous sustainability vetting process combined with fashion industry expertise and brand development support
valueProposition.whyNow: Post-pandemic shift toward conscious consumption + supply chain transparency demands + influencer-driven discovery fatigue

businessModel.revenueStrategy: Dual revenue: 15% commission on sales + $99/month brand listing fee creates predictable base with upside participation
businessModel.pricingFramework: $99/month justified by marketing support and curation value; 15% commission competitive with Etsy (6.5%) but high for fashion margins

unitEconomics.estimatedLTV: $180-300 assuming 3-4 purchases over 18 months at $60 AOV

businessModel.scalabilityAssessment: Revenue scales with GMV, but curation quality may degrade. Need to build systematic vetting processes and brand success programs to maintain differentiation.

technicalFeasibility.recommendedStack: Shopify Plus marketplace solution + custom vetting portal

buildVsBuy.rationale: Shopify marketplace tools save 6+ months development time
Core differentiator, no existing solution meets needs
Stripe Connect handles marketplace payments well

risks.description: Unit economics don't work - high CAC + low margins + 15% commission creates unsustainable business
risks.mitigation: Start with higher AOV brands, negotiate performance-based commission tiers, focus on repeat purchase drivers

risks.description: Etsy or Amazon adds sustainability filters and verification, commoditizing your differentiator
risks.mitigation: Build deep brand relationships and success programs that create switching costs

risks.description: Sustainable fashion brands reject 15% commission due to already thin margins
risks.mitigation: Provide clear ROI through marketing support, customer data, and brand development services

risks.description: Scaling curation while maintaining quality standards
risks.mitigation: Develop systematic vetting criteria and processes early, hire domain experts

week1to4: Interview 20 sustainable fashion brand founders about marketplace pain points
Analyze competitor commission structures and brand success rates
Build financial model with realistic CAC/LTV assumptions
week5to8: Recruit 5-10 pilot brands willing to test platform
Set up Shopify Plus marketplace foundation
week9to12: Launch private beta with pilot brands
Test customer acquisition channels with $2K budget
Measure early unit economics and brand satisfaction

decisionAgenda.question: Platform: Build custom vs Shopify marketplace tools?

options.tradeoff: Faster launch, proven payments vs limited customization
Full control, unique features vs 6+ month delay, higher cost

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Start with Shopify Plus - speed to market is critical for testing demand and unit economics

decisionAgenda.question: Launch scale: 10 brands or 100 brands?

options.tradeoff: Deep relationships, better curation vs limited selection
More choice, faster GMV growth vs diluted curation, harder to support

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Start with 10-15 brands in 2-3 categories. Quality over quantity is your only defensible moat.

decisionAgenda.question: Commission structure: Flat 15% or tiered?

options.tradeoff: Simple, predictable vs may price out smaller brands
More brand-friendly vs complex, lower initial revenue

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Start tiered: 10% first $10K monthly, 15% above. Shows you're invested in brand success.
